title: Beaufortia cyrtodonta
taxonomy: Beaufortia cyrtodonta is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, commonly known as the myrtle family. It is a shrub native to China and is classified within the genus Beaufortia. The genus Beaufortia is part of the tribe Beaufortieae, which is a subfamily of Myrtaceae known as Myrtoideae. This plant is further classified into the order Myrtales and the clade Rosids, which is a group of flowering plants with net-veined leaves. Beaufortia cyrtodonta's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the myrtle family.
